subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from Our presence unto him who hath been illumined by the lights of the Countenance and hath hearkened unto the call of his Lord, the All-Knowing, the All-Wise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدنا الی الذی فاز بأنوار الوجه و سمع ندآء ربه العلیم الحکیم
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @consolation and comfort, @chastisement and requital, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @banishment to; life in 'Akka, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God
